response.overview: # Riyana  It tells the story of an arranged family marriage between Riyana (Amyra Rosli) and Zafran (Remy Ishak), which sparks love when Riyana becomes pregnant. However, their marriage is tested when their child, Cinta Aryana, is born without one foot. Riyana is a girl from a modest family. A brilliant student studying at a local university. An unexpected meeting with Zafran Zahim has turned her life upside down. A chance encounter with his brother, Hariz, brings Riyana even closer to her sworn enemy. God's destiny cannot be stopped by anyone. Riyana meets her soulmate in Zafran. But she is not happy. Riyana is not only heartbroken by her husband's attitude but also by her mother-in-law who hates her so much. As Riyana faces life's trials, Allah plants love in her husband's heart. Zafran eventually falls in love with his wife. However, happiness is only fleeting. Trials come upon them. Cinta Aryana, the bond of their love, is born imperfect. Riyana accepts it but Zafran cannot.
response.title: Jangan Menangis Cinta

crew.name: Raja Mukhriz Bin R. Ahmad Kamaruddin
